issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for API failures or missing design tokens, leaving edge cases unaddressed.

scenarios.name: Pull a node from a Figma URL and generate a pricing card
scenarios.rationale: Treatment fetches the node via curl against /v1/files/<file_key>/nodes with X-Figma-Token, normalizes spacing to a 4px scale, returns a semantic <article> with typed PricingCardProps and a CSS module folder layout; baseline used the wrong endpoint and inline tag soup with no token extraction.

scenarios.name: Dashboard layout from a Figma URL with responsive collapse
scenarios.rationale: Treatment splits the design into Sidebar/StatsGrid/DataTable, uses Grid/Flexbox (never absolute positioning), stacks below 768px and applies clamp() for fluid typography, and externalizes colors/type as design tokens; baseline produced a single monolithic component with absolute positioning and no responsive plan.
